name: SkyWalker2506-claude-plugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins by SkyWalker2506 — Telegram bridge, AI PR review, daily health check, agent sync

plugins.name: telegram-bridge
plugins.description: Bidirectional Telegram bot for Claude Code — text, photo, document, voice (Whisper TR/EN). Control Claude from anywhere via Telegram.

plugins.name: ai-review
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR review via OpenRouter free models (Gemma 3 27B). Posts AI-generated review comments on pull requests.

plugins.name: daily-check
plugins.description: Daily system health check — Ollama models, MCP servers, API keys, disk/RAM usage, token cost report.

plugins.name: sync-agents
plugins.description: Validate and sync agent .md frontmatter with agent-registry.json. Detects mismatches and orphaned entries.
